headline: How The Evolving Story For A. O. Smith (AOS) Is Reshaping Analyst Valuation Views
summary: A. O. Smith’s updated fair value estimate moves only marginally, shifting to $78.30 from $78.27, but even a small change can matter when you compare it with the latest Street price targets. Those revisions, both higher and lower, show how differently analysts are weighing the same information and what each side thinks needs to go right for the stock to line up with their numbers. As you read on, you will see how to track these tweaks and use them to follow the evolving analyst story around A...
